name: Hot Artichoke Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients in a bowl until well combined.
2. Transfer the mixture to an oven-safe dish.
3. Place the dish in an oven preheated to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
4. Bake for 20 minutes, or until the mixture bubbles gently.
5. Serve with crackers and enjoy.
Serves 6.
